top_signals.title: Sanctions relief lifts Iran’s oil outlook, but its full recovery will take time
top_signals.summary: As talks with the US aim to forge a lasting peace deal that lifts sanctions, Iran is eyeing a recovery for its battered oil sector, but a ramp-up in crude output and exports could be slower than that of its neighbors. Unlike other Middle Eastern producers, Iran has seen its oil infrastructure suffer from years ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pigment boss: ‘We’re replacing legacy players at the speed of light’
top_signals.summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder and chief executive of Pigment, said the company is replacing legacy enterprise software providers “at the speed of light”, as demand for AI-native business planning accelerates across the private sector. The Paris-headquartered platform, which helps companies including Unilever, Siemens, Anthropic and Coca-Cola run financial planning and performance management, is approaching $100m (£75m) [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
